caption: The video depicts a medical simulation or training session, likely part of a "Sim Week" program aimed at transitioning students to residents. A group of medical professionals, dressed in scrubs and wearing gloves, are gathered around a table covered with various medical instruments and materials. The central figure, a man in a pink shirt, appears to be leading the session, demonstrating a procedure or technique while the others observe closely and assist. The participants are engaged and focused, suggesting an educational and collaborative environment designed to enhance their clinical skills and teamwork. The setting is a well-equipped medical facility, complete with surgical tools and equipment, emphasizing the realism of the training scenario.
